introSection:
Taron is a steel launched roller coaster located at Phantasialand in Brühl, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany. Opened in June 2016, it is a Blitz Coaster by Intamin.

A clone of the ride opened at Sunac Land Chengdu in China in 2021. It is called All Speeds.

Taron holds the record for the most intersecting track points on a launched coaster (58).

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Taron is situated in the new-for-2016 area Klugheim, in Mystery. It is themed heavily with the track weaving in and out of buildings, and alongside paths. The area is complemented by a Family Boomerang from Vekoma named Raik.

sections.title: Incident
sections.content: A 42-year-old employee was killed in 2024 after he was hit by one of the roller coaster's trains.

fullText:
Taron is a steel launched roller coaster located at Phantasialand in Brühl, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany. Opened in June 2016, it is a Blitz Coaster by Intamin.

A clone of the ride opened at Sunac Land Chengdu in China in 2021. It is called All Speeds.

Taron holds the record for the most intersecting track points on a launched coaster (58).

Taron is situated in the new-for-2016 area Klugheim, in Mystery. It is themed heavily with the track weaving in and out of buildings, and alongside paths. The area is complemented by a Family Boomerang from Vekoma named Raik.



A 42-year-old employee was killed in 2024 after he was hit by one of the roller coaster's trains.
